About

Experience.
Support.
Results.

Change is happening at lightning speed, our eyes bloodshot by the pace, but raw with clarity. Bloodshot Studios lives in this space, a podcast consultancy that's a relief from creative chaos.

I'm Nicole Goodman, with 25 years spent in ad agencies, client-side marketing, and the last seven in podcasting, I've created Bloodshot Studios to help you harness your big communication goals. I'll help deliver your message through honest, engaging storytelling and grow your audience with early planning and strategic marketing.

Let's turn your relentless drive into opportunity, give your brand a voice, and your idea a life that resonates with people who should hear it most.

Services

Before, during and after you press record.

01

Strategy & Consulting

Before a single word is recorded, I’ll work with you to build your podcast strategy, shape the story and align your brand voice. Sustainable audience growth requires a 50/50 split between producing a high-quality podcast and actively promoting it. I can help develop your podcast marketing strategy, and ensure that everything feels intentional, cohesive and built to resonate.

02

Podcast Production

For nearly a decade I’ve produced podcasts of the highest quality. When it comes to your podcast, I’ll manage every stage of the process, ensuring the content is sharp, consistent, and true to your vision. While you stay focused on what you do best, I’ll make sure everything comes together exactly as it should.

03

Behind the Mic

From hosting and co-hosting to narrative voice-over, I bring warmth, clarity and professionalism to every recording. I’ve also spent decades studying theatre, speech and dramatic arts, so whether you need a confident voice in front of the mic, or a coach to help your executives and hosts find theirs, I’ll make sure every word lands the best it can.

04

Audit & Workshop

Sometimes you just need a fresh set of expert eyes. I’ll audit your existing podcast content, assessing what’s working, what isn’t, and where the opportunities exist. To build in-house capability, I run practical workshops that equip your team with the skills and confidence to take ownership of your podcast, for some or all stages of the process.

Work

Podcasts brought to life.
